char_status: Member of 表盘, Owner of 颠茄

appearance.clothing: White shirt under black jacket, black long skirt, gemstone bowknot at collar.

char_description.overview: Runs 颠茄 Bar, 表盘's stronghold and information brokerage.
char_description.combat_style: Avoids combat, using 灵视 to detect lies and emotions before conflict erupts. When necessary, deploys 潜渊 to intimidate and escape.

char_personality.quirks: Offers free first drink to new customers; Fidgets with collar bowknot when bored.

char_background.origin: Natural-born 灵能者 who rejected the 狩灵 path for gang life. Runs 颠茄 Bar, 表盘's gathering point and information brokerage.

char_special_abilities.灵力回路-潜渊: Envelops herself in black 灵力, taking the form of a fanged monster that instills visceral fear in onlookers. Can shift short distances through shadows, used primarily for intimidation and escape.
